titleStmt.title: SII 37.394: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 394. (A.R. No. B 41 of 1941-42.) Pāta-Prabhalavīḍu, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the Nīli-toṭṭi outside the village.
This is dated Śaka 1459, Hemaḷambi, Śrāvaṇa śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1537 A.D., July 12.
Incomplete. It refers to the assembling of the Vidvan-mahājanas of Prabhuvulavīḍu, the Kāṁpus and the people of the 56 countries in the mukha-maṇḍapa of Yakkalidēvamma of Kaulakuṇṭa.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 130.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1459
Agunēṁṭi hēmalaṁbi saṁvatsara śrā
vaṇa śuddha 5 gu śrīmadrājādhirājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrī Accuta dēvarāya
mahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai sakala sā
mrājyamunnu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu
śrīmatu prabhuvulavīṭi sthitāśēṣa vi
dvanmahājanālunnu ciṁnappareḍḍi gaṁggireḍḍi
pōtulavōbiḷareḍḍinni modalaina kāṁpu
lunnu kaulukuṁṭa yakkaladēvaraṁma mukha
maṁṭṭapānaṁ gū¨rcunna sakala saṁdōha
yāṁbhaiyāru dēśālavāruṁnnu yakkali dē
vi peda ḷivōbuḷayānu vīru modalainavā
ru prabhuvulavīṭi cākali tippana koḍku
pedacennu basavana . nāgana . dādana . bhū
mana cina cenu . pōlu . pāpana . ja 8 kinni
Digital edition of SII 37.394 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
